arabic: حَدَّثَنَا قَبِيصَةُ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، عَنْ طَارِقٍ، قَالَ ذُكِرَتْ عِنْدَ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْمُسَيَّبِ الشَّجَرَةُ فَضَحِكَ فَقَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي وَكَانَ، شَهِدَهَا‏.‏

english.text:
(The tree where the Ridwan Pledge of allegiance was taken by the Prophet) was mentioned before 
Sa`id bin Al-Musaiyab. On that he smiled and said, "My father informed me (about it) and he had 
witnessed it (i.e. the Pledge) ."

chapter.english: Military Expeditions led by the Prophet (pbuh) (Al-Maghaazi)
